prompt: A cinematic vertical poster of {argument name="subject name" default="Sam Altman"} styled like a futuristic football superstar campaign image, waist-up portrait, centered, arms crossed, wearing a plain dark navy or black crewneck sweater, confident and calm posture, looking slightly off-camera. Place him inside a dramatic high-tech stadium or arena at night with bright floodlights glowing from the upper left, dark steel architecture overhead, and a cool blue sci-fi atmosphere. Add floating particles and light debris in the air for energy and motion. Surround the subject with futuristic AI interface graphics: 1 glowing wireframe cube icon on the left side, 1 luminous digital brain or neural-network globe on the right side, and multiple transparent holographic dashboard screens with charts and data panels behind him. Use a deep blue, black, and white color palette with sharp contrast, glossy highlights, subtle lens glow, and premium blockbuster poster lighting. Make the composition sleek, aspirational, and tech-forward, like a sports ad merged with artificial intelligence branding. At the bottom, add the title text {argument name="main title" default="THE FUTURE"} in very large metallic white uppercase letters, with the word "THE" smaller above the main word, and add the tagline {argument name="tagline" default="Built with Intelligence"} below in smaller spaced-out sans-serif text. Include faint hexagonal HUD linework near the lower corners and a glowing horizontal light streak cutting through the title area. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, poster design, polished commercial key art, 9:16 aspect ratio.
translatedPrompt: 一张电影感竖版海报，主角为 {argument name="subject name" default="Sam Altman"}，风格呈现为未来感足球巨星宣传照，半身肖像，居中，双臂交叉，身穿深海军蓝或黑色纯色圆领毛衣，姿态自信从容，视线略微偏离镜头。将他置于夜晚极具戏剧性的高科技体育场或竞技场中，左上方有明亮的泛光灯照射，头顶为深色钢结构建筑，营造出冷色调的科幻氛围。空中加入漂浮的粒子和微小碎片，以增强能量感和动感。在主角周围环绕未来感 AI 界面图形：左侧放置 1 个发光的线框立方体图标，右侧放置 1 个发光的数字大脑或神经网络球体，身后悬浮多个带有图表和数据面板的透明全息仪表盘。采用深蓝、黑、白配色方案，对比强烈，具有光泽感的高光、微妙的镜头光晕以及高级大片海报的布光效果。构图时尚、富有抱负且具有前瞻性，如同体育广告与人工智能品牌的融合。在底部，添加标题文本 {argument name="main title" default="THE FUTURE"}，使用非常大的金属质感白色大写字母，其中“THE”字样较小，位于主标题上方；并在下方添加标语 {argument name="tagline" default="Built with Intelligence"}，使用较小的、字间距拉开的无衬线字体。在下角附近加入淡淡的六边形 HUD 线条，并有一道发光的水平光束穿过标题区域。超精细，照片级真实感，海报设计，精致的商业主视觉图，9:16 纵横比。

breakdown.creativeCore: 未来感 AI 体育海报：此提示词可生成一张科技领袖化身为足球巨星的时尚竖版电影感海报，非常适合社交媒体发布、宣传艺术图或 AI 主题的营销视觉素材。
breakdown.subject: 界面
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: B2B 产品概念图、后台系统、数据看板
breakdown.whySelected: 得分 84；构图: centered, vertical, horizontal；风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, sci-fi, premium；包含文字或排版元素

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, sci-fi, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: lens, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
